title: Fermented Light Ethiopian Lemon Stir-fry
description: A light and refreshing dish perfect for sick days, featuring unwaxed lemons that have been fermented lightly to add a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Wash and lightly ferment the lemons for a couple of days, then remove the rinds and slice thinly.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and red pepper flakes, sautéing for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced lemons to the pan and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, allowing them to caramelize slightly.
Pour lemon juice into the wok, stirring quickly to combine with the other ingredients. Cook for an additional minute until most of the liquid has evaporated.
Season with turmeric powder if desired, then remove from heat and serve.
